rankings.title: Who Captures a Tax Cut? Property Price Capitalization from France's €20B Taxe d'Habitation Abolition
conditions: constructing property-level predicted TH exposure credibly
demonstrating strong pre-trends/placebos across multiple exposure definitions
a clear welfare/incidence/who-benefits decomposition beyond an average price effect

rankings.title: Maternity Ward Closures and Birth Outcomes in France
conditions: confirming outcome availability at high resolution
obtaining credible closure timing
upgrading identification—ideally threshold-based RD/IV or regulator-driven quasi-random timing rather than pure DiD

rankings.title: Low-Emission Zones (ZFE) and Property Values at City Boundaries
conditions: obtaining precise
legally stable boundary shapefiles by date
showing strong covariate smoothness/placebos
adding credible mechanism measures—potentially satellite/traffic proxies if monitors are sparse

rankings.title: Sunday Trading Liberalization and Local Retail Markets
conditions: securing DADS or equivalent employment data
explicitly designing around spillovers/displacement
endogenous zone selection
having enough ZTIs/cities for credible inference

rankings.title: Municipal Mergers (Communes Nouvelles) and Local Public Goods
Who Captures a Tax Cut? Property Price Capitalization from France's €20B Taxe d'Habitation Abolition
conditions: successfully validating parallel trends between early/late treated communes using the 2014-2017 pre-period
heavily leaning on the secondary residence placebo

rankings.title: Maternity Ward Closures and Birth Outcomes in France
conditions: securing restricted SNDS health data
finding an instrumental variable or sharp RDD around the 300-birth threshold to isolate exogenous closures

rankings.title: Low-Emission Zones (ZFE) and Property Values at City Boundaries
Sunday Trading Liberalization and Local Retail Markets
Municipal Mergers (Communes Nouvelles) and Local Public Goods
Who Captures a Tax Cut? Property Price Capitalization from France's €20B Taxe d'Habitation Abolition
conditions: robust event-study visuals pre-empting trend concerns
full mechanism tables with transaction volumes

rankings.title: Maternity Ward Closures and Birth Outcomes in France
conditions: confirming open data granularity
adding travel-time mechanisms
